# preferences

**Instance Property**

The receiver’s preferences.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var preferences: WebPreferences! { get set }
```

## Related Documentation

- **standard()**: Returns the standard set of preferences that may be used by all WebView objects.

## Getting and Setting Preferences

- **preferencesIdentifier**: The identifier of the receiver’s preferences.
